studies.title: HelloBetter Sleep Study
studies.brief_summary: Difficulties in falling asleep and maintaining sleep as well as waking up early in the morning are are classified as symptoms of insomnia. Individuals suffering from sleep related problems often also experience impairments during the day, such as daytime sleepiness, lower performance and/or mood swings. According to guidelines, individuals suffering from insomnia should be treated with cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia (CBT-I). However, only few individuals suffering from insomnia receive this form of treatment. HelloBetter Schlafen offers CBT-I as an online therapy program with an optional companion app and aims to reduce insomnia symptoms. The aim of the HelloBetter Sleep Study is to investigate the effectiveness of the HelloBetter Schlafen online therapy program.
